detail: All data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 via our cloud provider's native encryption services.
All data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher. TLS 1.0 and 1.1 are disabled across all endpoints.
MFA is enforced for all users accessing production systems and corporate applications via Okta.
Access is granted on a least-privilege basis. Role-based access control (RBAC) is enforced across all systems.
Access reviews are conducted quarterly for all production systems and annually for lower-risk systems.
A documented incident response plan is maintained and reviewed annually. The plan covers detection containment eradication recovery and post-incident review.
Our target RTO is 4 hours for Tier 1 systems and 24 hours for Tier 2 systems.
Tabletop exercises are conducted annually and include cross-functional participation from Legal Privacy and Engineering.
Automated vulnerability scans are conducted weekly on all production systems using industry-standard tooling.
A patch management policy requires critical patches to be applied within 15 days and high patches within 30 days.
Annual penetration testing is conducted by a qualified third-party firm. Findings are tracked to remediation.
All third-party vendors with access to sensitive data undergo a security assessment prior to onboarding and annually thereafter.
All vendors are required to adhere to our Third-Party Security Policy as a condition of contract.
A publicly available privacy policy is maintained and reviewed annually. It covers data collection use retention and individual rights.
DPIAs are conducted for all high-risk processing activities involving personal data including new product launches and significant system changes.
We are GDPR compliant. Our privacy program includes lawful basis documentation data subject rights processes and a DPA for relevant vendors.
We are compliant with CCPA and CPRA. We support consumer rights requests and have updated our privacy notice accordingly.
A documented BCP is maintained covering people process and technology. It is reviewed and updated annually.

keywords: test bcp,bcp test,continuity test,disaster recovery test
detail: The BCP is tested annually via tabletop exercise and failover testing for Tier 1 systems.
All employees complete security awareness training at onboarding and annually thereafter. Phishing simulations are conducted quarterly.
Security awareness training is conducted annually for all staff with targeted training for high-risk roles (engineering finance) conducted semi-annually.
We hold a current SOC 2 Type II certification. The report is available under NDA upon request.
evidence: SOC 2 Type II report (available under NDA)

detail: We do not currently hold ISO 27001 certification. Our security program is aligned with ISO 27001 controls and we are evaluating certification in 2027.
We have not experienced a reportable security breach in the past 24 months.
We maintain an AI Acceptable Use Policy governing the deployment and use of AI/ML systems. The policy is reviewed annually and aligned with the NIST AI RMF.
